name: Dog Fest Meat Medallions With Ostrich (90G)
description: Let your dogs try something new and exotic, they will love this fantastic taste. Tender yet chewy, these medallions with ostrich meat will be highly appreciated. Composition: duck, ostrich, vegetable by-products, minerals Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 28, crude fat 11, crude fiber 1, crude ash 5, moisture 2
